# Changelog

All notable changes for the LIV SDK will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [2.1.2] - 2025-10-21
## Added
- In Unity 6.0 or newer, an error will be displayed if RenderGraph is enabled
without compatibility mode.

## [2.1.0] - 2024-08-23
## Fixed
- Editor inspector not rendering properly when inspector was set to min width.

## [2.0.9] - 2024-08-21
## Added
- Toggle for override Alpha With Depth Buffer shader.

## [2.0.8] - 2024-08-19
## Added
- Feature flag to observe enabled/disabled status of LIV avatar.

## [2.0.7] - 2024-07-25
### Added
- Changelog file to project.
### Fixed
- Spam warnings generated from calling a LIV function from OnValidate.

## [2.0.6] - 2024-07-19
### Added
- Improved error handling for incorrect build targets.
- Improved handling of service initialization errors.

## [2.0.5] - 2024-07-08
### Fixed
- Internal bugs.

## [2.0.4] - 2024-07-04
### Added
- Default LIV settings asset.
### Fixed
- Issue with generation of LIV settings object.

## [2.0.3] - 2024-06-18
### Fixed
- Bugs in SDK renderer.

## [2.0.2] - 2024-06-18
### Fixed
- Internal bugs.

## [2.0.1] - 2024-06-18
### Fixed
- Internal bugs.

## [2.0.0] - 2024-11-2024
### Added
- Support for Meta Presence Platform Passthrough, Scene Anchors, Hand Tracking
